name: archive_management
description: Ability to compress and extract ZIP and TAR archives
instructions_md: To compress: use compress_files with a list of file paths or an include_dir to zip an entire folder. Output path should end in .zip. To extract: use extract_archive with the archive path and target output_dir. Supports .zip, .tar, .tar.gz, .tgz formats automatically. Verify file_count in the return value matches the expected number of files.
